text: Walking through this modern, almost stark space, I am struck by the contrast between the cool glass and the vibrant patterns adorning the exhibits. The world here feels deliberate and curated; every object and display seems to invite reflection. The echoes of innovation and inquiry written on the walls stir a quiet excitement in me—a gentle reminder that progress is both a communal and solitary journey. Here, curiosity feels at home, and I sense the hum of potential in the air.
